emails.subject: nda
emails.body: Been a while since we have done one of these, but here's a new one. This will need to be bilateral because they are going to divulge information about how they structure their business of supplying sports games over the internet. Please let me know if this is acceptable with a reasonable amount of change or if we should send them our draft. thanks Dave Forwarded by Dave Samuels/HOU/ECT on 08/01/2000 03:30 PM "George Emerson" <gemerson@sportsrocket.com> on 08/01/2000 03:24:06 PM Please respond to <gemerson@sportsrocket.com>
